Clan Elemental Battle Armor The standard Clan elemental battle-armor suit mounts one primary and one secondary weapon; plus detachable SRM- 2 pack Treat the SRM pack as an SRM launcher that can fire one missiles in turn and has onc additional reload (thus the launcher carries total of four missiles). Once the missiles have been expended, the launcher can be jettisoned to improve mobility.
